Metadata.title: Flip 7
Metadata.description: Shared-table web app for playing Flip 7 with live scoring.

Home.heroBody: Start a shared-table match that handles dealing, action cards, score modifiers, and the race to 200 without a paper score sheet.
Home.createSubtitle: Start a new lobby and invite friends to join.
Home.joinExistingSubtitleDesktop: Have a code? Enter it here to jump in.
Home.joinExistingSubtitleMobile: Have a code? Enter it here.
Home.step1: Seven unique number cards ends the round with a Flip 7 bonus.
Home.step2: Freeze banks points. Flip Three forces three more cards.
Home.step3: Second Chance discards one future duplicate instead of busting.
Home.lobbyNotFoundBody: There is no open lobby for code {code}. It may have expired or the game may have started.
Home.joinTableBody: Code {code} is ready. Enter your name to claim a seat.

MatchSetup.title: Flip 7
MatchSetup.subtitleJoin: Enter your name and join the game
MatchSetup.subtitleCreate: Create a game or join an existing one
MatchSetup.rulesIntro: Hit to reveal another card, stay to bank what you have, and avoid duplicate numbers unless a Second Chance saves you.
MatchSetup.rulesStep1: Seven unique number cards ends the round immediately with a Flip 7 bonus.
MatchSetup.rulesStep2: Freeze banks a player's current total. Flip Three forces three more cards.
MatchSetup.rulesStep3: Second Chance discards one future duplicate instead of busting the player.
MatchSetup.footnote: Share the match URL after setup. Each player enters their own name when joining, and refresh reconnects to the latest committed turn.
MatchSetup.toastNameLength: Name must be 20 characters or less.

JoinLobby.title: Join a Game
JoinLobby.description: Enter your name and the 4-character code to join an existing lobby.
JoinLobby.toastNameLength: Name must be 20 characters or less.
JoinLobby.toastJoinFailed: Could not join the lobby. Check the code and name.

Game.matchNotFoundBody: The requested match is unavailable or has not been created yet.
Game.joinSubtitle: Enter your name to claim a seat at the table.
Game.toastNameLength: Name must be 20 characters or less.
Game.toastInviteCopyFailed: Could not copy the invite link.

GameSettings.title: Game settings
GameSettings.advancedHelper: Cards will include numbers 0-{maxNumberCardValue}. Modifiers will go up to +{maxModifierValue}, plus x2.

extended.label: Extended
extended.helper: Better for 4-5 players. More cards and a slightly longer match.

big-table.label: Big Table
big-table.helper: Better for 6+ players. Larger deck, higher ceiling, longer match.

Errors.INVALID_MATCH_STATE: This action is not allowed in the current match state.
Errors.STALE_GAME_STATE: The game changed. Refresh and try again.
Errors.INVALID_TURN: It is not your turn or the turn is invalid.
Errors.INVALID_ACTION: That action is not valid right now.
Errors.LOBBY_CODE_UNAVAILABLE: Could not assign a lobby code. Try again.
Errors.LOBBY_NOT_FOUND: No lobby found for that code.
Errors.NAME_ALREADY_TAKEN: That name is already taken at this table.
Errors.PLAYER_COLOR_ALREADY_TAKEN: That player color is already taken at this table.
Errors.PlayerColorAlreadyTaken: That player color is already taken at this table.
Errors.NOT_HOST: Only the host can do that.
Errors.INSUFFICIENT_PLAYERS: At least two players need to join before the game can start.
Errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.

Events.second_chance_used: Second Chance discarded duplicate {duplicate} instead of busting the player.
Events.freeze_applied: Frozen! Points banked and out of round.
Events.flip_three_targeted: Flip Three targeted! {cardsRemaining} cards to draw.
Events.deferred_action: {action} was queued until Flip Three finished.
Events.second_chance_held: Player stored a Second Chance card.
Events.second_chance_discarded: Extra Second Chance was discarded because no eligible recipient existed.
Events.second_chance_passed: Extra Second Chance was passed to another active player.
Events.initial_deal: Initial deal revealed {card} for the player.
Events.noneYet: No table event has been logged yet.

modifier.effectPlus: +{value} THE SUM OF YOUR NUMBER CARDS
modifier.effectX2: ×2 THE SUM OF YOUR NUMBER CARDS

RoundHistory.title: Score by round
RoundHistory.subtitle: Track the running total, the gain from each round, and who is closing in on the target score.
RoundHistory.empty: No rounds to show yet. Live history appears as soon as the first round starts.
RoundHistory.currentRoundBreakdownSubtitle: Detailed scoring for the active or most recently completed round.

ScoreSummary.title: Round breakdown
ScoreSummary.subtitle: Number totals, multiplier effects, bonus cards, and the final score each seat carries out of the round.

TurnControls.freezePrompt: Choose who banks their points and freezes out of the round.
TurnControls.flipThreePrompt: Choose who must keep drawing until three cards resolve.
TurnControls.selectTargetHint: Click a player lane to select target
TurnControls.claimToPlay: Join the game from this device to play.

GameTable.roundRace: Round {round} of a race to {target} points.
GameTable.roundScoredReady: The round is scored and ready for the next deal.
GameTable.playerDeciding: {name} is deciding whether to push or bank points.
GameTable.joinHint: Join this game on this device to take turns.
GameTable.tableLayoutHint: Your lane stays pinned above. Scroll to see others in turn order.
GameTable.layoutPreferenceAria: Choose how the game table is displayed
GameTable.roundTableHint: Your hand is below. Hover other players' cards to fan them out.
GameTable.breakdownHint: Expand to review numbers, bonuses and multipliers.
GameTable.breakdownReady: Round scored. Expand to see each seat's totals.
